heading: Outdated broadband systems
label: 950bb–4 Outdated broadband systems
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–334, title VI, § 6205(b)132 Stat. 4739Dec. 20, 2018“The amendment made by this section [enacting this section] shall not take effect until .”October 1, 2020
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–334, title VI, § 6205(b)132 Stat. 4739Dec. 20, 2018“The amendment made by this section [enacting this section] shall not take effect until .”October 1, 2020

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), the Secretary shall consider any portion of a service territory that is subject to an outstanding grant agreement between the Secretary and a broadband provider to be unserved for the purposes of all broadband assistance programs under this chapter, if the broadband service in that portion of a service territory is less than 10 Mbps downstream transmission capacity or less than 1 Mbps upstream transmission capacity.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: b Exception
children.text: The Secretary shall not consider a portion of a service territory described in subsection (a) to be unserved if the broadband service provider has constructed or begun to construct broadband facilities that meet the minimum acceptable level of service established under , in that portion of the service territory.section 950bb(e) of this title
